title: picea excelsa f. fennica
intro: Picea excelsa f. fennica, also known as the Scots pine, is a variant of the Norway spruce tree (Picea excelsa) native to Europe. The medicinal properties of Picea excelsa f. fennica include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial compounds that can be found in its resin and needles. The health benefits of consuming Picea excelsa f. fennica, typically in the form of herbal teas or infusions, include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Picea excelsa f. fennica can also be used to make essential oils, salves, and other topical applications for skin and wound care.
